use_cases: Showcasing product features with animated gradient backgrounds on hover
Displaying service or pricing tier cards with skew transformations
Creating visually striking portfolio or showcase grid layouts
Adding animated blur effects to card content for depth
Building interactive feature highlights with morphing gradient panels
ai_summary: A visually striking gradient card showcase featuring skew-transformed gradient panels with blur effects and smooth hover animations. The component uses multiple layered spans to create depth through animated glows and blur halos, making it ideal for premium product or feature displays. Built with Tailwind CSS for flexible responsive behavior across platforms.
